arts.ttl: Arsenal could consider Lee Kang-in if PSG open to loan with option to buy
arts.sum: According to a report from The Athletic, Arsenal would be interested in bringing Lee Kang-in (23) to the Emirates if Paris Saint-Germain were open to entertaining a loan offer with…

arts.ttl: Former Arsenal star slams Mikel Arteta for 'killing' him - 'I was expecting help'
arts.sum: Former Arsenal captain Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang was one of the club's most influential players before he was forced out following a breakdown in his relationship with Mikel Arteta

arts.ttl: Who have I upset?' - Jamie Carragher makes bold Newcastle claim in Arsenal Carabao Cup prediction - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher believes Newcastle will be in the Carabao Cup final and has described a domestic cup triumph for the St James' Park faithful like 'winning the Champions League'. Carragher believes the Newcastle can go all the way and believes the impact of the success would be like Liverpool winning a European Cup. Speaking on Sky Sports Monday Night Football, he said: “I’d say Newcastle [in the final].

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Newcastle: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: The Carabao Cup semi-finals get underway on Tuesday night as Arsenal welcome Newcastle United to the Emirates. Newcastle also downed Premier League opposition to make the semi-finals, with the Magpies benefitting from Thomas Frank rotating his team heavily on Tyneside.

arts.ttl: Arsenal keen to sign 23-year-old – Gunners already made €20m offer, which may be enough if presented again
arts.sum: Towards the end of last summer, Arsenal made a €20m bid for goalkeeper Joan García, but Espanyol turned it down and referred to his €30m release clause. Last September, Espanyol sporting director Fran Garagarza indicated they could sell the 23-year-old in the future after rejecting the Gunners’ bid. arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Newcastle United – Match Preview and Team News
arts.sum: Arsenal entertain Newcastle United this evening in the first leg of their Carabao Cup semi-final. Mikel Arteta’s side came from behind to beat Crystal Palace 3-2 at the Emirates Stadium in the quarter-finals. But his side’s attacking options have taken another blow as Ethan Nwaneri has been ruled out with a muscular injury. arts.ttl: Arsenal's Nwaneri 'out for a few weeks' with injury
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta says teenage attacking midfielder Ethan Nwaneri will be "out for a few weeks" with a muscular issue.

arts.ttl: We simulated Arsenal vs Newcastle to predict Carabao Cup semi-final clash
arts.sum: Arsenal take on Newcastle United later today as the Gunners look to get off to a good start in their Carabao Cup semi-final tie. Attention turns away from the league later today though, with Mikel Arteta's side taking on Newcastle in the first leg of their Carabao Cup semi-final clash.

arts.ttl: Newcastle's record in the matches Bruno Guimaraes has missed since signing looks worrying ahead of Arsenal clash
arts.sum: Newcastle United have a worrying record without Bruno Guimaraes who has missed just a small handful of games since arriving on Tyneside three years ago....

arts.ttl: My Newcastle United career ended after zero appearances in four years but I met my expectations
arts.sum: Signed amid much fanfare due to his exploits at Lima-based side Deportivo Municipal, Vilca left Tyneside last year having made no first-team appearances for Newcastle United . Speaking to Eldiez, Vilca said:“What can I say, honestly, in general, with the job, I can’t say that I didn’t meet expectations because the first day I arrived at Newcastle United I trained with the first team, it wasn’t hard for me, but I don’t know.
